serviceDescription: Amazon Kendra is an intelligent search service powered by machine learning. Kendra reimagines enterprise search for your websites and applications so your employees and customers can easily find the content they are looking for, even when it’s scattered across multiple locations and content repositories within your organization.

components.label: Amazon Kendra Edition

components.content: Amazon Kendra Developer Edition provides developers with a lower- cost option to build a proof-of-concept; this edition is not recommended for production workloads. It supports up to 4,000 queries a day and 10,000 documents. Connector usage is charged separately, for more information please visit Kendra Pricing

components.label: Amazon Kendra Developer Edition Hours (Per Month)
Amazon Kendra Developer Edition Price

components.label: Amazon Kendra Developer Edition pricing, excluding connector usage charges

components.content:
Kendra Enterprise Edition provides a high-availability service for production workloads. Pay for the number storage units and query units that you provision. The minimum configuration is one storage and one query unit. You can add storage or query units as needed, with the ability to store as many documents as you need. Connector usage is charged separately, for more information please visit Kendra Pricing.

AWS is running an offer for customers with more than 1 Million documents and/or 500K daily search queries. For details, please reach out to the Kendra team at Kendra-support@amazon.com.

cards.title: Amazon Kendra GenAI Edition usage
cards.helpText: With the Amazon Kendra Index, you pay for storage units, query units and connectors. Once you provision a Kendra Index, you are charged for storage unit and query unit hours from the time an index is created until it is deleted.

components.content: Kendra GenAI Edition delivers the highest accuracy by leveraging the latest information retrieval technologies and semantic models. It offers high-availability and is built for production workloads. For details, please reach out to the Kendra team at Kendra-support@amazon.com.
